basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) has officially announced the Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree or a Graduate degree with 3 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications via email on or before 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate degree Or Graduate degree + 3 years of relevant experience.
qualification.details: Post graduate degree Or Graduate degree + 3 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Kanpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree or a graduate degree with at least 3 years of relevant experience to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 16,000 to Rs. 38,000, with a potential increment of Rs. 1300.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Project Manager position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
